channel.title: Dirty Laundry
channel.description: Latest releases from Dirty Laundry on Dropout.tv

item.title: Who Ended a Relationship Using Sorcery?
item.description:
CollegeHumor alums Hayley, Pat, Brian, and Nick drink Lake Erie slushes and learn some new things.

Duration: 55:44

Tags: Dirty Laundry, lily du, grant o'brien, talk shows, competitions, drinking, never have i ever, embarrassing, terrible things, hayley marie norman, pat cassels, brian huskey, nick kocher

item.title: M&M
item.description:
Grant shows how to make the perfect shift drink.

Duration: 03:10

Tags: Dirty Laundry, grant o'brien, drinking, alcohol, cocktails, DIY

item.title: Whose Mom Was an Accomplice to Armed Robbery?
item.description:
Zach, Rachel, Jared, and Elyse drink M&Ms and try not to get canceled.

Duration: 53:30

Tags: Dirty Laundry, lily du, grant o'brien, talk shows, competitions, drinking, never have i ever, embarrassing, terrible things, zach noe towers, rachel pegram, jared goldstein, elyse myers

item.title: Ruby Shrub
item.description:
Grant shows how to make a gorgeous drink.

Duration: 03:56

Tags: Dirty Laundry, grant o'brien, drinking, non-alcoholic, mocktails, DIY

item.title: Hot Buttered Rum
item.description:
Grant shows how to make a rich and creamy drink.

Duration: 03:12

Tags: Dirty Laundry, grant o'brien, drinking, alcohol, cocktails, DIY
